name: =?utf-8?Q?James=20Bradley?=
subject: If you don't join the fight, then we're screwed
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=510164f1fb&e=fdefed58de)
---
Peter,PATRIOTS, it's the end of another year, a year that saw:
* _More than**2 million** illegal immigrants invade our country._
* _Unchecked, historically high AND IGNORED inflation._
* _Ever-rising AND IGNORED violent crime statistics._

But more importantly...**A YEAR IN WHICH WE WATCHED AS KARI LAKE HAD THE ARIZONA GOVERNOR’S ELECTION STOLEN FROM HER BY STILL MORE DEMOCRAT VOTING TRICKERY!** My name is **James P. Bradley** and as you may know, I and 12 other congressional candidates, along with **The Election Integrity Project of California** , are currently engaged in one of America’s most important election lawsuits.We all remember how we felt watching **President Trump** being pushed out of office in 2020, ‘beaten’ by a senile old man who barely even ran a campaign. We knew it was wrong then, and we know it’s still wrong today when we see the **Arizona DEMOCRAT Secretary of State** STEALING the election from our beloved **Kari Lake** and proclaiming HERSELF the winner of the governor’s race she oversaw!**AS IF BY MAGIC, RED ARIZONA FLIPPED ITSELF BLUE!**_**I won't stand for this chicanery, and neither should you!**_

| [HELP JAMES BRADLEY FIGHT BACK!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=5519a7b961&e=fdefed58de)
---
That’s why I’m coming to you today to garner your support in the race to save and restore American voting. Right now, no conservative Republican can feel safe in voting because we’ve all just seen and learned too much.**Democrats seem to win EVERYTHING THEY NEED TO WIN, and RINO REPUBLICANS help them. Every DAMN time. MY TEAM AND I WILL MAKE VOTING FAIR AGAIN, but we need your support to stay in the fight!** This lawsuit that I’m fighting against the**Secretary of State, Attorney General and Governor of California** is quite possibly the most important legal action taking place in the country right now, because...Without fair elections we don’t have AMERICA; we have**Joe Biden’s “** _**MAKE AMERICA MEXICO”**_**** version of America — **AND WE THE PEOPLE DESERVE BETTER THAN THAT!**_[**If you’re as outraged as I am and want to sleep soundly knowing that when you vote your vote will be counted, please donate $50, $25, $10 — whatever you can, because lawsuits like this are expensive to fight and killer to win!**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=3ac13d7785&e=fdefed58de)_
| [WE CAN WIN THIS FIGHT WITH YOUR HELP: DONATE RIGHT NOW!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=32406e5039&e=fdefed58de)
---
**SUPPORT THIS BATTLE IF YOU WANT A RETURN TO:**
* _**One-day elections**_
* _**NO universal mail-in**_
* _**No Drop-boxes**_
* _**Mandatory voter ID**_
* _**ZERO ILLEGALS VOTING!!!**_

EVERYTHING**Joe Biden** has done since his first day in office has been an ongoing assault on America and our system of government, and if you’re still feeling the sting of being cheated in 2020 _**THIS IS A CAUSE YOU’LL WANT TO SUPPORT**_ to keep a nightmare like **Biden** from ever happening again.**DEMOCRATS CHEATED TRUMP IN 2020, DEMOCRATS ARE CHEATING KARI LAKE TODAY IN 2022.****THE PROBLEM WONT FIX ITSELF.**
| [FUND OUR FIGHT: $25.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=a08c2edc66&e=fdefed58de)
---

---
| | |
---
| | |
#
Friends,

It's hard to believe 2022 is almost over. I had hoped to send you this letter earlier, but frankly, at the Center for Renewing America, we prefer to spend more time fighting in the trenches than writing about it. So I'll cut to the chase.

We have a small team working around the clock on a shoestring budget with a single focus: _stop the woke progressive left from destroying our country_.

We are very close to meeting our goal for the year in order to stay on schedule to address the threats facing the country–and there are some incredible, strategic opportunities that may not come around again. [Will you help us meet our goal in raising **$45,000** in the next two days](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=f5a018e00f&e=17913c7d6d)? ([Give online](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=c8dea01136&e=17913c7d6d) or mail to 300 Independence Ave. SE. Washington DC 20003.)

**Our results speak for themselves.**

→ We’re leading the charge to call on Congress to investigate corrupt, weaponized government agencies like the FBI.

→ We’re working overtime to stop Kevin McCarthy and instead choose a conservative Speaker of the House.

→ We’ve helped rally dozens of local and state officials to declare an invasion and force the federal government to tackle the border crisis.

We punch way above our weight class because we’re focused, determined, and we fight with the urgency that the country’s very survival is at stake. There’s so much more of our great work I could tell you about, but I promised to be brief.

**Before the end of 2022** , [please consider ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=a403ecce68&e=17913c7d6d)[helping us save our country](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=a3f8aae531&e=17913c7d6d)[ from leftists who would destroy it from the inside out](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=35cd690871&e=17913c7d6d).
---
| Sincerely,

Russ Vought
President
Center for Renewing America

name: Alexandra Rojas (via JusticeDemocrats.com)
subject: We operate on a shoestring budget
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, Justice
Democrats is one of only a few organizations completely focused on
recruiting and electing diverse, working-class primary challengers to
unseat corporate Democrats.

We’ve accomplished so much in only a few years. It all started with
recruiting and helping to elect AOC. Then we re-elected the Squad and
powered upset victories for Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, and Summer Lee. A
powerful bloc fighting for the people is forming in Congress, and we’re
determined to grow it even more.

We also operate on a budget one-tenth the size of many other political
organizations. The level of support we’re able to provide the next wave of
progressive primary challengers largely depends on whether or not we hit
our fundraising goal before midnight tomorrow.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123931?refcode=em20221230-26813&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26813%2E1203867%2Egr_aS2 ]Rush a $3 donation or anything at all to help us make up
the gap and reach our $75,000 end-of-year fundraising goal.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123931?refcode=em20221230-26813&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=26813%2E1203867%2Egr_aS2 ]Contribute $3

Meeting our fundraising goal before our end-of-year deadline would put us
in a position of strength as we head into 2023. It will ensure we have the
resources to fund our candidate recruitment program and find the strongest
possible progressive challengers for the next Congressional elections.
Then, we can take on even more corporate incumbents who are fighting to
resist our progress.

We can pass a Green New Deal, get Medicare for All, and fight for racial
justice with a movement of everyday people like you supporting
working-class champions as they run for Congress and work to transform the
Democratic Party.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123931?refcode=em20221230-26813&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=26813%2E1203867%2Egr_aS2 ]Can you make a donation right away to help us hit our end-of-year
fundraising goal and have the resources to take on the corporate wing of
the Democratic Party?

We’re ready to find the next progressive fighters to run for Congress,
whether they’re a nurse, middle school principal, bartender, activist, or
another working-class champion. We know you’re ready too.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=26813%2E1203867%2Egr_aS2 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=26813%2E1203867%2Egr_aS2 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221230-26813-footer&t=1024&refcode2=26813_1203867_gr_aS2&akid=26813%2E1203867%2Egr_aS2

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=26813%2E1203867%2Egr_aS2

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

A powerful bloc fighting for the people is forming in Congress, and we’re determined to grow it even more. We also operate on a budget one-tenth the size of many other political organizations. The level of support we’re able to provide the next wave of progressive primary challengers largely depends on whether or not we hit our fundraising goal before midnight tomorrow. [ ]Rush a $3 donation or anything at all to help us make up the gap and reach our $75,000 end-of-year fundraising goal. [ ]Contribute $3 Meeting our fundraising goal before our end-of-year deadline would put us in a position of strength as we head into 2023. It will ensure we have the resources to fund our candidate recruitment program and find the strongest possible progressive challengers for the next Congressional elections. Then, we can take on even more corporate incumbents who are fighting to resist our progress. We can pass a Green New Deal, get Medicare for All, and fight for racial justice with a movement of everyday people like you supporting working-class champions as they run for Congress and work to transform the Democratic Party. [ ]Can you make a donation right away to help us hit our end-of-year fundraising goal and have the resources to take on the corporate wing of the Democratic Party? We’re ready to find the next progressive fighters to run for Congress, whether they’re a nurse, middle school principal, bartender, activist, or another working-class champion. We know you’re ready too. In solidarity, Alexandra Rojas Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jessica=20Anderson=2C=20Heritage=20Action?=
subject: How WE beat Nancy Pelosi
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
Heritage Action just led the defeat of a radical piece of legislation that Nancy tried to sneak through. Here’s how. | | | | | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=fd14cef2fc&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Heritage Action recently defeated a radical piece of legislation called the “EAGLE Act” that Nancy Pelosi tried to sneak through right before Christmas _._ This legislation would have empowered China, hurt American workers, and worsened our current immigration crisis by increasing chain migration.
So how did Heritage Action stop this **BAD BILL **from becoming law? _Inside and outside pressure._
---
| | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=534f33a800&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | [**WATCH NOW >>**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=9fdd71c794&e=fdefed58de)
---
Fellow Conservative, Heritage Action raised the alarm and the grassroots pressure from our nationwide network of Sentinel activists convinced representatives who initially supported the bill to change their position. In the end, Pelosi pulled the scheduled vote for the EAGLE Act—she knew she didn’t have enough votes to pass it! This is the _perfect example_ of our important work at Heritage Action to recruit, train, and equip the Conservative Grassroots in America. [**We hope you’ll join the fight here at Heritage Action by making an initial donation today >>**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=618d13a232&e=fdefed58de)

My final End of Year fundraising deadline is tomorrow night and I’m far from my goal. Without your help right away, I’ll have to report we fell short.
I wanted to reach out to you one last time because I know you’re a dedicated conservative and a loyal grassroots supporter.

Friend,

I will be the first to tell you there were plenty of times I thought about giving up and throwing in the towel.

**At this point -- that's just not an option. **

Our case proved, without a doubt, that not everything was as it seemed during Arizona's November election.

Now, the far-left political operatives and Fake News media are hoping this recent ruling will end my fight once and for all.

**They are dead wrong. I 'm not going to stop fighting.**

I promise you -- I will appeal this case and continue our struggle to secure our election until my very last breath.

**However, I need to know -- do I have your support?**

| [**YES, YOU HAVE MY SUPPORT!** ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d9db594e4e984634a1d1d771e87a804c&_e=DBXLPltUggenTVtyiOHLVTS6aaM19wfu23jyNz6fOtvJckwINcryUPOBbl8qp2EnExttbvAP09xWHpteGY4L3ThGWrdkOnAfDqAJb6vKx4cGcWytk6dY53UpLboB-bqFDvaSh-K8GXNN69OCQUJBUZv5gY1u5O_-R4orpWD1KM9bfsIZUDcZJKyW6s4Mpcs76w26PtI1Wt4VMb5oCWYBDLRaZh7kCwyOEbYCnLER4Qzq9wJfrIcc3pvUODh33f_1uQnN7B-p3uLXHRgt7RUIW6qRulTNw2LMvlFjeDBljOsTz9FK5mnFwwh_y_Bc9Fv9tqzT_7Q_oYkkaDCkSZNHJOOC0iKtCSWKpCz11E4ATeDw5QzMmwfHErzbIyqr82ZHWOXNutPYxtIdqdaq2ydHKbHfUVQSNQSS8T8oapvVBMZI33DJeq2MuvyfZXDNyy9_DeL10Z4VqlSTUFq0PrSqeQp1VJKz5vMAOMrOwTvQywRNXD9Rs6B_19_wNgPQmOPTsYrNatFi63vih9QRstEUj-60z5kIir089WEOwbtD-bm-wcm4-b2mweh2URLrhd_k)

name: Dan Kildee
subject: Thanks to supporters like you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Hi, it’s Dan. Your support helped us have a decisive victory in last month’s election. Despite running in a Republican-leaning district, we won thanks to incredible grassroots supporters like you.

We also won because we knew the race would be competitive and we made early investments in our organizing and outreach efforts. Because of redistricting, our district will remain one of the most competitive (and expensive) House races, and holding this district will require around-the-clock organizing.

**Our first step to making early investments in this race is to have another strong Federal Election Commission (FEC) quarterly report when our fundraising numbers go public at the end of the month.** That's right — we’ve already got another fundraising deadline coming up!

Our grassroots supporters helped us have consistently strong reports leading up to our election last month, and now I’m asking you to help us do it again.

clean_body: | Hi, it’s Dan. Your support helped us have a decisive victory in last month’s election. Despite running in a Republican-leaning district, we won thanks to incredible grassroots supporters like you. We also won because we knew the race would be competitive and we made early investments in our organizing and outreach efforts. Because of redistricting, our district will remain one of the most competitive (and expensive) House races, and holding this district will require around-the-clock organizing. Our first step to making early investments in this race is to have another strong Federal Election Commission (FEC) quarterly report when our fundraising numbers go public at the end of the month. That's right — we’ve already got another fundraising deadline coming up! Our grassroots supporters helped us have consistently strong reports leading up to our election last month, and now I’m asking you to help us do it again. = If you saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, clicking a button below will cause your donation to process instantly. | | = | = | = | = | = | = The work we do now will make all the difference as we prepare for another competitive race in 2024. If you can, please make a contribution today to support our efforts. = Thank you so much, Dan Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. | | Folks, if there’s one thing we’ve learned from my election, it’s that we can’t listen to everything that the pundits say. First, they said that we’d lose this seat. Now, they’re saying that the incoming GOP majority will shut Democrats out from the conversation in the House. But, here’s the thing – _I will get as loud as necessary to make sure your voice is represented in Congress._ I’ve never taken a backseat when it comes to advocating for Nevadans and I don’t intend on doing so now. clean_body: I’ve got my boxing gloves on | = | | Folks, if there’s one thing we’ve learned from my election, it’s that we can’t listen to everything that the pundits say. First, they said that we’d lose this seat. Now, they’re saying that the incoming GOP majority will shut Democrats out from the conversation in the House. But, here’s the thing – I will get as loud as necessary to make sure your voice is represented in Congress. I’ve never taken a backseat when it comes to advocating for Nevadans and I don’t intend on doing so now. This brings me to my question – | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | No matter which of these issues keeps you up at night, know that I’m doing everything I can to make sure your voice is heard. name: Andy Beshear
subject: 5,136 votes. That’s all it took
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
I’m the only incumbent Democratic governor up for re-election in 2023 Peter,

Have you ever felt like your vote wasn't important? Well, I have news for you.

In 2019, I defeated Matt Bevin by **5,136 votes.** And over 1.4 million people cast their ballots during that election. That is a _tiny_ margin. All this to say, **every single voice matters.** I sincerely believe that, and I hope you do, too.

When I ran for governor in 2019, it was to represent and serve every single Kentuckian, not just those who voted for me. I signed up to show up each and every day to fight for Kentuckians in every corner of our great commonwealth.

[**As we head into the end of the year, my campaign is gearing up for the tough election ahead. Can I count on you to help us finish the year strong? If you can, contribute to my re-election campaign today and help us win next year so we can keep making progress for Kentuckians >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56618358/385575061/-1742588925?refcode=em22_221230_EOY3_fnd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221230_EOY3_fnd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDEzZTZjYS02Yjg4LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N2vTssrzlWDil5V6tAatOqDYKwXUceawmmd8sReSFMU=)

I am the only incumbent Democratic governor up for re-election in 2023, and it's going to be a competitive race. I'm up against a dozen opponents, and my team is already preparing for an expensive campaign.

We've accomplished so much over the first three years, and I want to continue fighting to make Kentucky the best state in the nation. But I can't do that without you.

[**Will you help me end the year on a high note? Contribute to my campaign and help me continue making our state better. Any dollar amount goes a long way. Donate today >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56618364/385575068/-1742588925?refcode=em22_221230_EOY3_fnd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221230_EOY3_fnd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDEzZTZjYS02Yjg4LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N2vTssrzlWDil5V6tAatOqDYKwXUceawmmd8sReSFMU=)

Kentucky is a special place that I love to call home. Thanks for your support.

Sincerely,

Andy | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign?** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56618373/385575077/-1742588925?refcode=em22_221230_EOY3_fnd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221230_EOY3_fnd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDEzZTZjYS02Yjg4LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N2vTssrzlWDil5V6tAatOqDYKwXUceawmmd8sReSFMU=)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Lauren Boebert’s race was ignored by pundits and by most Democrats with power and money. In the end, 541 more votes would have led to one of the biggest upsets in the past generation in a congressional race. Well, we have good news! Her challenger, Adam Frisch, knows he can win, and is talking about running again.
body:
Frisch could do this
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T94d82393-9b61-4eda-8164-b43317d396ac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, **_Blue Amp Action was one of the first--if not the first--groups to tell you Lauren Boebert was vulnerable to a spirited challenge by Aspen City Councilman Adam Frisch in early 2022, sharing that her Trump-leaning district is:_** a) Not as Trump-y as those of most of the other flying monkeys she's associated with (Gaetz, MTG, Gohmert, Jordan, etc); b) she was unpopular in the district because of her never-ending-look-at-me antics, scandals & abject cruelty; c) Unlike most of her fellow loons, she's in a state controlled by Democrats who wouldn't bend congressional-district-lines to accommodate her difficulties d) Adam Frisch was a good candidate, and as a moderate Democrat, a good fit for the district. **Yet, the race was ignored by all the pundits, by most Democrats with power and money and, in the end, 541 more votes would have led to one of the biggest upsets in the past generation in a congressional race.** **_Well, we have good news! Frisch knows he can win, and is talking about running again._** [**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10 or $25 to Adam Frisch before the December 31st deadline? To send a message to Frisch and to Boebert that this rematch needs to be on, and this time, Frisch will be the last one standing._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6c7e916b-ead3-4853-821c-32bd2f64ac6f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| _Add in Boebert's most recent scandal, that her attacks against international hero, President Volodymir Zelensky of Ukraine, during his visit and congressional speech were used as propaganda on Putin-mouthpiece RT, and Frish is leaning towards another run._ [**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10 or $25 to Adam Frisch before the December 31st deadline? To send a message to Frisch and to Boebert that this rematch needs to be on, and this time, Frisch will be the last one standing._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5588c1b0-2039-4028-b55c-eb90a800081d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for fighting for our democracy seat by seat.

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. body:
| |
---
|
---
| | Friend, **Have a 2A Task Force New Year! ** The holiday season focuses on the things that truly matter - God, family, and our country. The 2A Task Force focuses on defending one of our most essential constitutional rights, the right to keep and bear arms, and highlights the importance of not complying. Despite the Biden administration and the radical left’s mission to rewrite our Constitution, our mission is to reinforce and protect us from tyrants using the power of government to take away our liberties. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | PETER: | | This may seem like a lot of ground to cover in two days, but we know that our team of grassroots supporters is up to the challenge. Time and time again, when we’ve needed you most, you’ve stepped up and shown us that we can count on you in times of dire need. It is absolutely crucial that we finish 2022 and start 2023 on a high note. The money we raise now will lay the groundwork for what we’re able to accomplish in 2023 and 2024, and right now, it’s not looking like we’ll be able to accomplish much of anything — not without a huge boost from our grassroots team. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | — The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. | Team,

We’ll make this quick.

We know everyone’s focus is about to turn to 2023 – us included. Which means we have to hit this $2,000 goal to make sure we can immediately hit the ground running to support our newly-elected Democrats, and build toward the 2024 cycle.

But we just checked ActBlue, and we’re still a couple hundred short of hitting our goal.

name: Team Jayapal
subject: What lies ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
There are only 2 days left in 2022, and we are falling short of reaching an important goal of $900,000 for the year. We expected fundraising to slow down around the holidays. But it’s a big issue when small-dollar contributions from emails like the one you’re reading right now make up a huge chunk of our overall fundraising.
**With a Republican-controlled House looming in 2023, we can’t afford to miss our December 31 deadline goal.**
[**Can you chip in $3 or any amount right now so we can catch up on our fundraising and continue pushing for our progressive priorities in the new year?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25411?refcode=em20221230-2001&t=1&akid=2001%2E420207%2E6qHeso)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25411?refcode=em20221230-2001&t=20&akid=2001%2E420207%2E6qHeso)**
**The challenges we face won’t disappear when the clock strikes midnight on New Year's Eve.** Working people will still be relying on the Senate and President Biden to deliver real, tangible change — like lowering prescription drug costs, extending the monthly Child Tax Credit, passing paid leave, guaranteeing affordable child care, and so much more that will make a real difference for families and communities across America.
If we get to work now, 2023 can be the most monumental year of progressive change and victories yet. But to make that happen, we need to catch up — and fast. [**Make a contribution of $3 or anything you can afford to help reach our final goal of the year before the mandatory federal deadline. Doing so will help us be prepared to keep up these important fights in the new year.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25411?refcode=em20221230-2001&t=21&akid=2001%2E420207%2E6qHeso)
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221230-2001-footer&t=22&refcode2=2001_420207_6qHeso&akid=2001%2E420207%2E6qHeso)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Brent Bozell
subject: The Washington Post is falling
body:
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=81a743382b274d5da7dd4333828574b8&_e=TaX7blw3ZKKsDVaU2fLaCfdS8cicRH1kQlO7slIY1eshKLFWU2tCVQjJMQM_gtJxXgE4kuwKSV5AWhCPSaIAJznLCqdfu4RlbUaGFDxl48dtj-9Gsn37djtEIDR27HjQpf8z-enQop5n9vwz7aZAeEjPVNvg0q7xhNV2VLYBY1Symn3gKO16tYcnwowLOvT3T_vpVLM0HnPy1Gr-EMjsHFnlGYeNERk6xTYakcrPqRQ1i1qRUoy_auuVONY6bamZV5lB6EYGS9BYW_D4HIhvFQ%3D%3D)
Friend,

I just read one of the best things of 2022 - _The Washington Pos_ t, which lost 500k subscribers this past year, announced upcoming layoffs.

Do you know what this means, Friend?

**We 're winning!**

My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing activists pretending to be journalists and stopping them from using the media to push their socialist agenda.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's belief in that trust-- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the left-wing media anymore. **

Now I need you to help us destroy them for good. That's why I've set a goal to raise $7,500 by the end of the week.

[_**Can you help MRC hold the left-wing media accountable for their corruption and lies? Click here to send a gift of $10, $25, $50, or any amount today and**_ _**help us DESTROY the media**_ _** >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=81a743382b274d5da7dd4333828574b8&_e=TaX7blw3ZKKsDVaU2fLaCfdS8cicRH1kQlO7slIY1eshKLFWU2tCVQjJMQM_gtJxXgE4kuwKSV5AWhCPSaIAJznLCqdfu4RlbUaGFDxl48dtj-9Gsn37djtEIDR27HjQlJVtQyLdLZgxPAoX67R1dQtVrcbb194eH80ZkfaZ7UPsq5l9bsBEB7ucXuWq26-aSFobCCtOTvqcpgRy7kY_z5bMa8ZV0pqgjubrOhSOwSKCmOi8DzffSUiPLbCqjXTRFmLheoykbUX8Agam13rqzg%3D%3D)

I will not stop my mission until the average voter sees corporate journalists for the traitors they really are.

They've used their power to sway our elections.

**During the 2020 and 2022 elections, the media manipulated MILLIONS of voters through their radical political agenda.**

They refused to give airtime to important arguments of the Republican
campaign -- both pro-Trump and anti-Biden -- and ran a constant stream of negative material on President Trump.

Millions of voters cast their ballots knowing only what the media permitted them to know about the candidates.

**The leftist media have the power to change our elections. And if we don 't stop them, they will do it again!**

[_**Help MRC show voters that corporate journalists are now traitors to America >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=81a743382b274d5da7dd4333828574b8&_e=TaX7blw3ZKKsDVaU2fLaCfdS8cicRH1kQlO7slIY1eshKLFWU2tCVQjJMQM_gtJxXgE4kuwKSV5AWhCPSaIAJznLCqdfu4RlbUaGFDxl48dtj-9Gsn37djtEIDR27HjQgVauESGFkjAmU8Rhk0ZQRy6iHpq6ozegk_mBw90LRhCZCppiVvq3FU4u68XV8LRgu-xwBEWU1dWu80SJArdODTE8aEr3hLPOXKvx6VyWSzh-pq28RABkRAL_wKm5oxjpUjjo8EyA9fhPISBGne4TTg%3D%3D)

Here's how MRC exposes the left-wing media:

1. **MRC monitors and clips videos of all news content from major networks, social media accounts, and cable outlets. **

We have over 850,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987.

2. **My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and left-wing media bias. **

3. **MRC 's team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth. **

The Media Research Center also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters.

Your generous gift helps us expose the radical leftists who have hijacked the media for their socialist agenda. Click below to donate today.

Now , we’re running about 230 donors behind our goal and risking starting out the critical municipal elections at a disadvantage. If we don’t hit this goal, we’re going to start 2023 out behind. = Democrats want to create a better future for all Hoosiers. With city and town elections around the corner, we can’t afford to cede ground to Republicans who only wish to divide us for their own political interests. = | = Thanks, Indiana Dems | | = | = [content goes here] Indiana Democratic Party 115 W Washington INDLPS, IN 46202 United States Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. **** INDems would like to wish you a Happy New Year! May this new year bring you good health and good fortune.
****_In 2022, President Biden and Hoosier Democrats built the economy from the bottom up and middle out by delivering on the daily issues that Hoosiers care about most._ **Here’s are just a few highlights of what President Biden and Democrats delivered in 2022:** **✅** Signed the _Inflation Reduction Act_ into law
**✅** First major gun safety legislation in decades
**✅** Created historically low unemployment
**✅** Signed _CHIPs and Science Act_ into law
**✅** Signed _PACT Act_ into law for veterans
**✅** Reauthorized the _Violence Against Women Act_
**✅** Signed the _Respect for Marriage Act_ into law **** **It’s past time to fix the INGOP’s 20-year mess. It begins by electing Democrats up-and-down the ballot in 2023 and 2024 to give Indiana some common sense leadership.** **** _Friendly reminder: the INGOP has created an F-rated quality-of-life for families across the state._ clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ** INDems would like to wish you a Happy New Year! May this new year bring you good health and good fortune. In 2022, President Biden and Hoosier Democrats built the economy from the bottom up and middle out by delivering on the daily issues that Hoosiers care about most. Here’s are just a few highlights of what President Biden and Democrats delivered in 2022: ✅ Signed the Inflation Reduction Act into law ✅ First major gun safety legislation in decades ✅ Created historically low unemployment ✅ Signed CHIPs and Science Act into law ✅ Signed PACT Act into law for veterans ✅ Reauthorized the Violence Against Women Act ✅ Signed the Respect for Marriage Act into law It’s past time to fix the INGOP’s 20-year mess. It begins by electing Democrats up-and-down the ballot in 2023 and 2024 to give Indiana some common sense leadership. Friendly reminder: the INGOP has created an F-rated quality-of-life for families across the state. Hoosiers all want the same things: a safe place to live and raise a family, a solid job with good pay and benefits, quality schools for our kids, the freedom to live our lives, and the peace of mind to retire with dignity. The problem: The INGOP has failed Hoosiers and is severely limiting our quality-of-life and the potential of our children, our families, our workers, and our businesses. ❌ ❌ ❌ ❌ ❌ Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. Senator Shelli Yoder is ready to take on the GOP after they passed the worst government overreach in recent memory. A majority of Hoosiers - \- believe that the freedom to choose should be a personal right in all or most cases and only a woman and her doctor should make personal health care decisions. Why it matters: The GOP supermajority has shown no interest in protecting Hoosier women. Indiana Democrats are ready to stand up to the GOP’s extremism and deliver a better future for them and their families. INDems IN the News : Two Region lawmakers picked to lead Indiana Black Legislative Caucus : More than $20 million coming to Northwest Indiana from omnibus bill : State lawsuits defend abortion access with religious freedom : ‘That’s scary’: New gun trend has Marion County law enforcement asking for help from Indiana lawmakers : Judge: NW Indiana hospital must keep ER open for 9 months | AP News : Five major bills Congress passed in 2022 : Curriculum, pre-k and culture war bills among 2023 education priorities for Indiana lawmakers : Survey illuminates what Hoosiers want from the General Assembly : Unions expect to play ‘defense’ during legislative session Opportunities with INDems_ Regional Organizing Directors** The Indiana Democratic Party is hiring Regional Organizing Directors to to build a stronger party in the field throughout the Hoosier State. The role is ideal for someone looking to be more involved in politics and party building and who wants to dedicate themselves to learning more about the inner workings of campaigns, strategic planning, and voter targeting and contact. body:
Friend,
We are only one day away from the end of 2022 and I need your help. We set an ambitious goal to bring in 100 grassroots donations between now and the end of the year. With DFLers like you to support us, I know we can succeed! Will you make a donation today?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Donate $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec22?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=123022]

name: Katie Porter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15600%2E3422442%2Ex9xpZV)
Derek,
As 2022 comes to a close, I’m looking back at some of the progress we’ve made this year.
**To lower costs and strengthen our economy:**
* My legislation to **lower drug prices by recovering taxpayer dollars from Big Pharma companies when they raise prices faster than the rate of inflation** was included in the Inflation Reduction Act and signed into law.
* My bill to crack down on Big Oil’s greed and lower gas prices passed in the House.

**To crack down on corruption:**
* I introduced legislation **banning Members of Congress and their families from trading stocks.**
* I introduced legislation to increase transparency about who Members of Congress are meeting with, and to be transparent about our travel on taxpayer dollars.

**To protect the environment:**
* My bill to raise fees on **polluters who drill on public lands** was also signed into law.
* My legislation to better prepare us for wildfires and address record droughts passed in the House.

I introduced over twenty other bills, addressing all sorts of issues—from a bill that would allow the IRS to get you your tax return faster, to one that would support students’ mental health.
Thanks to you, I’ll be sworn in once again on January 3rd and am ready to continue this important work. If you have an idea for legislation I should work on in 2023, go ahead and submit it here.
**[Submit your ideas ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kpem-survey-focus-2023/?source=EMAE30_EOY_20221230_V1_F&t=2&akid=15600%2E3422442%2Ex9xpZV)**
Thanks for being on Team Porter!
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13991?refcode=EMAE30_EOY_20221230_V1_F&t=3&akid=15600%2E3422442%2Ex9xpZV)**
Katie

Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to update your information, please **[click here.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-update-info-footer/?t=4&akid=15600%2E3422442%2Ex9xpZV)** Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters chipping in to emails just like this one. If you would like to receive fewer emails, please [**click here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp-unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=15600%2E3422442%2Ex9xpZV).

To contribute via check, please address to: Katie Porter for Congress, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

body:
It’s that time again... between the holidays and the new year, we are working hard to set up Team Hayes for success as we prepare for another re-election cycle to begin. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56653841/385635818/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmM5ZDc4OC1hMjg4LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E_3gxIis_XrevEYXXhh9HwMYEE_x1y7BZbcfL_ZN1z8=&emci=eda46bd0-5288-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&emdi=cfc9d788-a288-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&ceid=15529135) | Hi, It’s that time again... between the holidays and the new year, we are working hard to set up Team Hayes for success as we prepare for another re-election cycle to begin. This is not just our final deadline of the year, but it’s our opportunity to get an early start on the 2024 cycle. _**We need your help to ensure no matter what challenges lie ahead, we have the resources to overcome them!**_ We’ll be honest, November’s election was closer than anyone expected. And facing the tough reality of a Republican-controlled House, Jahana will remain one of the GOP’s top targets for 2024. _That means we can’t afford to waste a single moment._ [**We’re already preparing for Jahana’s re-election campaign. From safe neighborhoods with adequate housing to economic opportunity, all Houstonians deserve an opportunity to thrive in Houston. I am the leader that can make it happen. | | | Amanda is fighting to ensure that our minority and women-owned businesses have the resources they need. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wB7DWu1u8h5QTGLUn-vuE3hu6E28TwOViBeqTZzuoBib7qyxQvMzLp35fUu-eBIipjl1H06XP01lGQySsgZug2JnibQl_RNdrPkxYF-Jp3UypC4gSHt2COfkY3wY8hn8L-3fTKj_k_NPgJKNq2yVCEZsxj6lr0c1lhPmx_nrqgKx4B8p-E6Pu3WSCby3bLN-S8iIXrnt4FOBWgbkNqKYuNdB55o_2aJHRs_uKFZFPxsH83lqvWxFR3dV2hfBAF1EyzKWQfZFk2mzJsrsj7F8QNy2q2uZL1kPBh-rkYGvlnRKXLtme2Bhti3GlJzn-yqHw-Wd9eUTFEmnCcxn9WG2pMvEvSLwu0zXspkglZlb8sG9XSdNJwFEvajrzF1K8eI8KMHucaKzInP5ANcbqOYyK9EM_Woi_Sxt93g6Vcb5AV9A/3sf/vxqig50KRzWJsf0GB70H8A/h0/2WEWAJvbRBmh8XW23X-60DbLafcsssqkhM8NbXrDITo) | | Hi Friend,
>From safe neighborhoods with adequate housing to economic opportunity, all Houstonians deserve an opportunity to thrive in Houston.**I am the leader that can make it happen.** We’re a city of endless potential and ingenuity and we can lead our state and our country into the future. Now is the time to become a city of bold innovation, a city of inclusion, a city with strong, safe neighborhoods, and a city where all residents have the opportunity to thrive —**no matter who you are or where you live.
**
Together, we will improve public safety, upgrade Houston's aging infrastructure to combat flooding, enhance our transportation system, grow our economy, bolster our housing stock, support our schools, repair the city’s finances, and improve the quality of life for all Houstonians!

I need your help in order to make this vision a reality. Please donate to our campaign today so we can reach our fundraising goal needed for us to win this election. We need to raise $43,000 by the end of the year. I am the leader that can make it happen. | | | Amanda is fighting to ensure that our minority and women-owned businesses have the resources they need. | | Hi Friend, From safe neighborhoods with adequate housing to economic opportunity, all Houstonians deserve an opportunity to thrive in Houston.I am the leader that can make it happen. We’re a city of endless potential and ingenuity and we can lead our state and our country into the future. Now is the time to become a city of bold innovation, a city of inclusion, a city with strong, safe neighborhoods, and a city where all residents have the opportunity to thrive —no matter who you are or where you live. Together, we will improve public safety, upgrade Houston's aging infrastructure to combat flooding, enhance our transportation system, grow our economy, bolster our housing stock, support our schools, repair the city’s finances, and improve the quality of life for all Houstonians! I need your help in order to make this vision a reality. Please donate to our campaign today so we can reach our fundraising goal needed for us to win this election. name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: ALERT: conservative news you don't want to miss
body:
Exclusive audio confirming the IL GOP's tacit endorsement of Richard Irvin has triggered swift responses from Gary Rabine and other candidates.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/367a6445e001/alert-conservative-news-you-dont-want-to-miss?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6432a804e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_30_05_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6432a804e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Illinois Review: It's Time for the U.S. Postal Service to Audit the IL GOP Again (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/illinois-review-its-time-for-the-u-s-postal-service-to-audit-the-il-gop-again.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6432a804e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_30_05_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6432a804e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Former long-time Illinois House Speaker Michael Madigan, D, often said that the power of the state party resided in its postage discount.

Both state political parties, the IL GOP and the Democratic Party of Illinois (DPI), enjoy the benefit of a discounted postage rate based on their not-for-profit status.

The discount is not insignificant.

In fact, it’s a discount of more than half the cost of postage, and in a statewide race in which millions of mailers and other mail pieces are routinely mailed, the mail discount afforded by the IL GOP can translate to a savings of hundreds of thousands of dollars—savings that statewide campaigns can deploy elsewhere.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/illinois-review-its-time-for-the-u-s-postal-service-to-audit-the-il-gop-again.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6432a804e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_30_05_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6432a804e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/illinois-review-its-time-for-the-u-s-postal-service-to-audit-the-il-gop-again.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6432a804e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_30_05_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6432a804e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Exclusive: IL GOP Postage Discount on Mailer Attacking Trump Republican Candidate During Primary (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/exclusive-il-gop-postage-discount-on-mailer-attacking-trump-republican-candidate-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6432a804e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_30_05_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6432a804e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Illinois Review recently has learned that the IL GOP’s “non-profit” postage discount was applied to a mailer sent out on behalf of IL Republican State Rep. Tim Butler’s campaign, attacking his fellow Republican primary opponent Kent Gray – who was challenging Butler in the IL House Dist. 95 Republican primary race.

Weaponizing an IL GOP postage perk to attack a fellow Republican is a new low in Illinois Republican politics.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/exclusive-il-gop-postage-discount-on-mailer-attacking-trump-republican-candidate-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6432a804e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_30_05_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6432a804e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/exclusive-il-gop-postage-discount-on-mailer-attacking-trump-republican-candidate-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6432a804e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_30_05_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6432a804e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Rabine: Don Tracy and the IL GOP Should Reimburse Gubernatorial Candidates for Postage (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/rabine-don-tracy-and-the-il-gop-should-reimburse-gubernatorial-candidates-for-postage.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6432a804e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_30_05_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6432a804e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
When I learned in a recent Illinois Review article that IL GOP chairman Don Tracy allowed so-called Republican Richard Irvin’s campaign – the same man who pulled Democratic Primary ballots in 2014, 2016 and 2020 to use the IL GOP postage discount for his mailers, I was angry.

While the rest of us were out on the campaign trail, spending our own hard-earned money to get our messages out, the Irvin campaign, funded by billionaire Ken Griffin, was getting preferred postage discounts compliments of the IL GOP.

This is outrageous. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/rabine-don-tracy-and-the-il-gop-should-reimburse-gubernatorial-candidates-for-postage.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6432a804e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_30_05_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6432a804e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/rabine-don-tracy-and-the-il-gop-should-reimburse-gubernatorial-candidates-for-postage.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6432a804e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_30_05_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6432a804e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Exclusive Audio: Don Tracy Admits Irvin Campaign Used IL GOP Postage Discount During Primary (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/exclusive-audio-don-tracy-admits-irvin-campaign-used-il-gop-postage-discount-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6432a804e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_30_05_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6432a804e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
In exclusive audio recently obtained by Illinois Review, IL GOP chairman Don Tracy, during a meeting with conservative leaders in July, admits that the Irvin campaign for governor was allowed to use the IL GOP Postage discount for mailers – a perk not afforded to other gubernatorial candidates in the primary race.

Using the IL GOP postage discount can save a statewide campaign tens of thousands of dollars on mailers – an expensive, but necessary evil in politics.

Tracy acknowledges use of the postage discount in the recording, but says the IL GOP was taking its “direction from the House Caucus and the Senate Caucus.”
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/exclusive-audio-don-tracy-admits-irvin-campaign-used-il-gop-postage-discount-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6432a804e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_30_05_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6432a804e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

============================================================
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/exclusive-audio-don-tracy-admits-irvin-campaign-used-il-gop-postage-discount-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6432a804e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_30_05_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6432a804e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** The Big Lie: How Don Tracy and the
IL GOP Supported Democrat Richard Irvin's Primary Campaign (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/the-big-lie-how-don-tracy-and-the-il-gop-supported-democrat-richard-irvins-primary-campaign.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6432a804e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_30_05_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6432a804e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

In a February 22, 2022 article about the Richard Irvin campaign taking over the IL GOP, chairman Don Tracy was initially not available for a comment. But shortly after the article went live, Tracy changed his mind, and offered this to say,

“The Illinois Republican Party has been neutral and will always be neutral in the GOP primary for governor. Any accusation that we are coordinating with a particular campaign is absolutely false and I find it personally offensive to suggest otherwise.”

Tracy then concluded,

“It is our duty as the state party to focus on and take the fight to Gov. Pritzker on a daily basis. I’m proud of our efforts. All Republicans and every campaign at every level should be pointing out how Pritzker is a disaster for our state.”

But this statement by Tracy is a lie, and the IL GOP was never neutral during the GOP primary for governor.
** Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/the-big-lie-how-don-tracy-and-the-il-gop-supported-democrat-richard-irvins-primary-campaign.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6432a804e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_30_05_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6432a804e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/the-big-lie-how-don-tracy-and-the-il-gop-supported-democrat-richard-irvins-primary-campaign.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6432a804e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_30_05_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6432a804e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

FROM SENATOR JOSH HAWLEY: I'll tell it to you straight. The Biden Administration is: Using the DOJ to target political opponents rather than working to fix a multitude of issues facing our country. Allowing dangerous criminals to flood through our southern border. * Blatantly censoring conservatives online at every opportunity. Will you fight back with me against these radical socialists now, so our children don't have to witness our country DESTROYED by their corruption? \- Josh Hawley | | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: Has liberty become an illusion?
body:
Are we all just plugged into the matrix?

| | | |
---

Are we living in a matrix that the establishment has deliberately constructed over time in an effort to see just how much liberty we're willing to give up in exchange for temporary safety?

body:
---
| | I am humbled beyond belief. When I told you I was stepping away as Speaker of the House to help usher in a new generation of Democratic leadership... [**...I NEVER could have imagined the huge outpouring of support that came flooding in.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56633202/385594253/1694517773?refcode=20221230_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTU2MDk1OS03ODg4LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xBqk2OZTtMlAIlOAcaC67JHKD7statEtyv-5bHNuUB8=) [**_As of 2pm, I only need 8 more Democratic Memberships from 18326 to reach my goal and help Democrats have an UNPRECEDENTED showing before I officially hand over the reins to our new generation of leadership. I want to show just how many Democrats we have behind us as we start this new journey to reclaim our House Majority. It would mean so much to me if you’d be one of the final gifts I need from 18326 to reach my Membership goal before my End of Year Deadline. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56633203/385594254/1694517773?refcode=20221230_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTU2MDk1OS03ODg4LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xBqk2OZTtMlAIlOAcaC67JHKD7statEtyv-5bHNuUB8=) | [**2023 DEMOCRATIC MEMBER**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56633205/385594255/1694517773?refcode=20221230_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTU2MDk1OS03ODg4LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xBqk2OZTtMlAIlOAcaC67JHKD7statEtyv-5bHNuUB8=)

From the bottom of my heart, I cannot thank you enough for being on this journey with me.
Together, we helped transform health care for millions of struggling Americans.
We made historic investments in our planet that prioritized our future generations.

clean_body: | | I am humbled beyond belief. When I told you I was stepping away as Speaker of the House to help usher in a new generation of Democratic leadership... = = | = = = = = From the bottom of my heart, I cannot thank you enough for being on this journey with me. Together, we helped transform health care for millions of struggling Americans. We made historic investments in our planet that prioritized our future generations. We took on a deadly, once-in-a-generation pandemic and made sure our neighbors were safe, healthy, and taken care of during this difficult time. = = It would mean so much to me if you’d be one of the last Democrats I need to confirm their Membership before my End of Year Deadline. | = = = = = As always, thank you for everything, Nancy Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives. Team -- _Just days away_ from his official retirement from public service, **Dr. Fauci has been honored with a _huge_ award** from the Edward M. Kennedy Institute for his remarkable leadership!

Dr. Fauci has tirelessly served our country through MULTIPLE public health crises, including the COVID-19 pandemic -- but despite his lifetime of service, **Republicans have continued to attack and smear his reputation!**

We’re organizing a MASSIVE card to congratulate Dr. Fauci on his award for decades of leadership and public service -- **but your name is still missing, and the deadline is midnight! So please:**

**[Click here to sign the card and congratulate Dr. Fauci on his award for a _lifetime_ of public service! >>](http://go.dscc.org/go/11454?ask=5&t=6&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221230-SigntheCard-FauciKennedyAwardCongrats-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221230-SigntheCard-FauciKennedyAwardCongrats-Pros-sl1&akid=9303%2E9716520%2EleybjY)**

name: Team AOC
subject: 2022 Wrapped: 3 big climate wins
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Today we’re excited to share three big accomplishments this year for climate justice and a Green New Deal.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221229-3750-P_FND_EGR_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3750%2E2526796%2EHUE7w8)
As 2022 winds down, we’re looking back on our incredible work together this year.**Today we’re excited to share three big accomplishments this year for climate justice and a Green New Deal.**
### **We passed a historic climate bill in Congress**
In August, Congress passed the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) — the largest ever investment in fighting climate change with $369 billion! This funding is expected to create 9 million new jobs in renewable energy and lower annual energy bills by $1,000 per household.
It’s estimated that this bill will reduce greenhouse gases by 40% by 2030 and it dedicates $60 billion for environmental justice in communities hardest hit by climate change and fossil fuels.
### **We launched our first Green New Deal Projects**
Working with other House Members, we secured $100 million for 60 community projects, spanning from Hawaii to Vermont. These projects will create green jobs, increase renewable energy, and strengthen our weather resiliency.
With our Green New Deal project in NY-14, we are funding training for 300 students at SUNY Maritime for good-paying, union jobs in wind energy.
### **We defeated a fracked-gas power plant and replaced it with wind**
After years of organizing, last fall, New York officially denied the permit for the Astoria NRG fracked-gas power plant citing inconsistency with New York’s climate laws. It was a huge victory — but the fight wasn’t over yet, because NRG appealed the decision.
**But then, this past September, NRG filed a petition seeking approval to transfer the land’s ownership to Beacon Wind to build clean, wind energy infrastructure!** 1 Rather than a fossil fuel plant, Beacon Wind will bring jobs and renewable energy to NY-14.
This is a tremendous win for the community organizers who stepped up in the fight for environmental justice and put the ideals of the Green New Deal into place.
* * *
Ending the era of fossil fuels is imperative for our future. Doing so is no easy task. The fossil fuel industry has billions of dollars at its disposal. Your support helps make the fight a little fairer.
**Our campaign is 100% people-powered. In fact, we are the #1 small-dollar funded campaign in Congress.**[If you can, please consider making your first $3 donation today to keep Alexandria fighting Big Oil in Congress. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221229-3750-P_FND_EGR_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3750%2E2526796%2EHUE7w8)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221229-3750-P_FND_EGR_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3750%2E2526796%2EHUE7w8)**
Together, we will continue to hold Big Oil accountable and fight for the rapid transition to renewable energy we need. There’s so much more that needs to be done, but when our movement comes together, there’s nothing we cannot achieve.
Thank you for being a part of our movement,
Team AOC
1 - [Earthjustice](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14910?t=22&akid=3750%2E2526796%2EHUE7w8)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-202212?refcode=em20221229-3750-P_FND_EGR_GND&t=23&refcode2=3750_2526796_HUE7w8&akid=3750%2E2526796%2EHUE7w8)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20221229-3750-P_FND_EGR_GND&t=24&akid=3750%2E2526796%2EHUE7w8)**

clean_body: Today we’re excited to share three big accomplishments this year for climate justice and a Green New Deal. As 2022 winds down, we’re looking back on our incredible work together this year.Today we’re excited to share three big accomplishments this year for climate justice and a Green New Deal. We passed a historic climate bill in Congress In August, Congress passed the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) — the largest ever investment in fighting climate change with $369 billion! This funding is expected to create 9 million new jobs in renewable energy and lower annual energy bills by $1,000 per household. It’s estimated that this bill will reduce greenhouse gases by 40% by 2030 and it dedicates $60 billion for environmental justice in communities hardest hit by climate change and fossil fuels. We launched our first Green New Deal Projects Working with other House Members, we secured $100 million for 60 community projects, spanning from Hawaii to Vermont. These projects will create green jobs, increase renewable energy, and strengthen our weather resiliency. With our Green New Deal project in NY-14, we are funding training for 300 students at SUNY Maritime for good-paying, union jobs in wind energy. We defeated a fracked-gas power plant and replaced it with wind After years of organizing, last fall, New York officially denied the permit for the Astoria NRG fracked-gas power plant citing inconsistency with New York’s climate laws. It was a huge victory — but the fight wasn’t over yet, because NRG appealed the decision. But then, this past September, NRG filed a petition seeking approval to transfer the land’s ownership to Beacon Wind to build clean, wind energy infrastructure! 1 Rather than a fossil fuel plant, Beacon Wind will bring jobs and renewable energy to NY-14. This is a tremendous win for the community organizers who stepped up in the fight for environmental justice and put the ideals of the Green New Deal into place. Ending the era of fossil fuels is imperative for our future. Doing so is no easy task. The fossil fuel industry has billions of dollars at its disposal. Your support helps make the fight a little fairer. Our campaign is 100% people-powered. In fact, we are the #1 small-dollar funded campaign in Congress. Together, we will continue to hold Big Oil accountable and fight for the rapid transition to renewable energy we need. There’s so much more that needs to be done, but when our movement comes together, there’s nothing we cannot achieve. Thank you for being a part of our movement, Team AOC 1 - | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com

subject: It takes more than winning races to secure our democracy, we must protect its integrity from scammers, criminals, extremists and other malcontents who mostly assemble in today's GOP. We need to stand with the watchdogs who’ll take the time to follow all the loose threads.
body:
Watching out for us
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T04ac0151-1981-4526-aeeb-df922151a6bd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _**You've probably seen a lot about George Santos recently** , **a Republican elected to Congress **who claimed he worked at Goldman Sachs & Citigroup, attended NYU & Baruch College. None of this was true and we know that because of the pioneering work of Citizens for Responsibility & Ethics in Washington (CREW)._ [**_Can you join us in donating $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to CREW Today?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb464908a-aff5-4f40-a15a-21375747a5e0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**Santos claimed he was Jewish. He's not. He said his mom was from Belgium. She's from Brazil. In Brazil, he was charged with forging checks and we're not even 100% sure at this point that he's a U.S. citizen. **_ Sadly, from Majorie Taylor Greene to Lauren Boebert, Ted Cruz to Donald Trump, serial lying, conspiracy-mongering and even criminality are not shocking anymore. **_It will take more than winning races to secure our democracy, we must protect_**** _ its integrity from scammers, criminals, extremists and other malcontents who mostly assemble in today's GOP._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfaf7ceb5-5854-4426-b47d-0899358c32ab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_So we're asking you to join us in supporting Citizens for Responsibility & Ethics in Washington (CREW). They're done everything from successfully expose the grift running rampant in today's GOP to leading an effort that ended in the court-ordered removal of an insurrectionist from office_**-_-the first since 1869. In Otero County NM, Commissioner & head of "Cowboys for Trump" Couy Griffin saw his violent Jan 6th sedition cost him elected office, setting a key precedent and putting other Republican traitors on notice. _ _This is an important moment. George Santos' actions need a detailed investigation as he goes to Washington, if we're to have any chance of his removal. I can't think of anyone more likely to make it happen than CREW._ [**_Can you join us in donating $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to CREW Today?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5572c697-33d0-4a8e-bca1-bdabe8099057/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting for the integrity of our democracy. Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb71b192a-25bc-4f56-a98d-e894931880b2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Geoff Simpson
subject: Following up from my previous email
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, this is a
little bit longer of an email, but it’s important and I hope that you’ll
stick with me through the end.

Just a few weeks ago, we launched our 2024 Candidate Recruitment efforts.
We’re officially accepting nominations from folks across the country. In
2017, AOC was nominated to run by her brother and with your support, we
took on the entire political establishment and powered her campaign to
victory.

Now, as we approach 2023, we’ll be poring over thousands of submissions
and I wanted to share some ‘behind the scenes’ information with you on
this process.

Phase 1: District Prioritization

* Because we know millions of dollars from corporate interests will be
spent against our recruited candidates, we must be extremely
intentional and data-driven to determine what districts will be the
most impactful.

Phase 2: Community Outreach

* Recruiting everyday working Americans like nurses, principals,
community organizers, and union members takes a lot of work.
* Last cycle we reached out to nearly 4,000 members of various
communities across the country and vetted 1,500 nominees for Congress.
This deep connection to local communities is essential to finding the
next Cori Bush or Jamaal Bowman.

Phase 3: Launch Campaigns

* We’re with our candidates from Day 0, preparing them with everything
they need to run for Congress.
* No other organization in the progressive space recruits candidates to
run for Congress and works with them from the very beginning. We’re
making it possible for grassroots campaigns to even get started and we
continue to build the infrastructure for future leaders to run as
well.

We’ve elected some incredible leaders, shifted the Overton window, and are
building the infrastructure that allows truly grassroots candidates to
run, compete, win, take office, and start changing this country. And it’s
all possible because of people like you chipping what you can.

Our ability to carry out these plans next year will largely depend on
whether or not we reach our $75,000 end-of-year fundraising goal. We fell
short of our fundraising goal last month, so it’s really important that we
make up the difference.

That’s why I’m asking,
Peter: can you make
your first
donation to Justice Democrats today? Your support made our wins in 2018,
2020, and 2022 possible — I hope you can chip in today to help us win even
more primaries.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123939?refcode=em20221230-26818&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26818%2E1203867%2E5Se72p ]→ Yes, I can donate today to help build the Justice Democrats bloc in
Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123939?refcode=em20221230-26818&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=26818%2E1203867%2E5Se72p ]Contribute $3

Thank you for being a part of our movement and work.

In solidarity,

Geoff Simpson
Campaigns Director

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=26818%2E1203867%2E5Se72p ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=26818%2E1203867%2E5Se72p ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221230-26818-footer&t=1023&refcode2=26818_1203867_5Se72p&akid=26818%2E1203867%2E5Se72p

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=26818%2E1203867%2E5Se72p

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com
